---
title: "Hands-on Exercise 1"
---

Getting started

Install and launching R packages

The code chunk below uses p_load() of pacman 
package to check if tidyverse packages are installed in the
computer. If they are, then they will be launched into R. 


```{r}
pacman::p_load(tidyverse)
```

Importing the data
```{r}
exam_data <- read_csv("Exam_data.csv")
```
